Reading INSTALL.md — agent-mediated install runbook.
Step 0: confirmed I am a doorway, not a runtime. No launcher-specific config.
Step 1: node --version → v22.3.0 (ok), pnpm --version → 9.6.0 (ok)
Step 2: git clone https://github.com/fyodoriv/minsky.git → done
Step 3: pnpm install → prepare hook built dist/ for every workspace
Step 4: wrote ~/.minsky/config.json with cloud_agent=openhands, local model
Step 5: pausing for the one human prompt.

[AskUserQuestion]
> Minsky can submit anonymized runtime logs — iteration counts, error verdicts,
> and p95 timings — to help catch regressions and improve the daemon. No code
> content, no task content, and no personally identifying information is ever
> sent; the host path is SHA-256-hashed with a per-machine salt before
> submission. Do you agree to submit these anonymized telemetry events?
> (yes / no — default: no if you don't answer)

Operator answered: no
Step 5: MINSKY_AGENT=claude-code bin/minsky consent --no → wrote telemetry-consent.json
Step 6: bin/minsky daemon start --hosts-dir .. → daemon PID 48213, log at ~/.minsky/daemon.log
Install complete. I am out of the picture; the daemon runs independently.
